name: Spareribs with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Dry Rub Seasonings:
1. Combine salt, cumin, black pepper and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of seasonings.
3. Rub the mixture evenly over the entire surface of the spareribs.
Creole Mustard:
1. In a separate bowl, combine horseradish, yellow mustard, and white wine.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. Store in the refrigerator for up to several months.
Mustard Sauce:
1. In another bowl, mix minced garlic, brown sugar, and Creole mustard.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
Cooking Instructions:
1. Place the spareribs on the grill with the bone side down.
2. Glaze the ribs with the mustard sauce as they cook.
3. Turn the ribs several times to prevent burning and add more sauce to the upper side.
4. Near the end of the cooking time (approximately 15 minutes), glaze the ribs with honey.
